dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of queue activity, generated results, and system configuration.
dashboard.guideTitle: Go from backend to results in 4 steps.
dashboard.guideSubtitle: Local ComfyUI is best for full workflows; online API backends can call OpenAI-compatible image APIs directly from prompt parameters.
dashboard.step1Todo: Add a ComfyUI backend, or save online API settings and then add an online API backend.
dashboard.step2Todo: Upload a ComfyUI API JSON workflow. Online API mode can also reuse prompt parameters.
dashboard.step3Todo: Pick prompts, models, numbers, or files that should vary at runtime.
dashboard.step4Todo: Choose a preset, fill candidates, then compare generated results in the matrix view.

providers.title: Online API
providers.subtitle: OpenAI-compatible provider support is wired in and can switch vendors through baseURL.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage language, theme, runtime mode, and provider defaults.
settings.backendsDescription: Manage ComfyUI nodes, resource refresh, and connection tests.
settings.workflowsDescription: Import, maintain, and validate workflow JSON.
settings.presetsDescription: Configure invocation parameters, weights, and tags.
settings.batchDescription: Create batch jobs and tune concurrency strategy.
settings.providerGuideText: Save an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, then add an Online API backend in Backends with endpoint openai. Use the Online API section on the Run page for batch text-to-image or image-to-image.
settings.savedApiKeyPlaceholder: Key saved; leave blank to keep it
settings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Used for connection tests and Worker execution after saving

run.title: Run
run.subtitle: Online API can batch text-to-image and image-to-image directly; ComfyUI workflows still run through presets.
run.configNote: The run records submitted parameters and candidates; results can be compared in multiple views.
run.copiedSkippedFiles: , {count} file parameter(s) need to be reselected

onlineRun.title: Online API Batch Generation
onlineRun.subtitle: No workflow required. Each prompt line creates one task; image-to-image maps image groups to prompt lines.
onlineRun.modelPlaceholder: Use system default if empty, e.g. gpt-image-2
onlineRun.promptPlaceholder: One prompt per line. Paste 100 lines to create 100 tasks.
onlineRun.imageGroupHint: Files are grouped in selection order, {count} per group. Adjustable from 1 to 16 images.
onlineRun.selectBackendFirst: Select an online API backend first

runtime.title: Runtime Inputs
runtime.subtitle: Each parameter keeps a candidate list; the run records submitted parameters.
runtime.noInputs: This preset has no runtime inputs. Starting a run creates 1 task with fixed parameters.
runtime.uploadHint: Click or drag {type} files here. Multiple files are supported.

galleryMatrix.hiddenEmpty: All current results are hidden by filters. Show more parameter values to restore them.
galleryMatrix.empty: This batch has no displayable results yet.

login.title: Login
login.lan: LAN mode is active. You can use the app without logging in.
login.cloud: Cloud mode enables user, workspace, and permission isolation.

backends.title: Backends
backends.subtitle: Manage ComfyUI and online API execution backends, including connection tests, resource sync, and scheduling.
backends.empty: No backends yet. Click Add Backend to start.
backends.name: Name
backends.providerHint: Online API backends use the OpenAI-compatible settings. Use provider id as endpoint, currently openai.
backends.providerNoResources: Online API backends have no local resources to sync
backends.deleteConfirm: Delete this backend? Related resources and health records will also be deleted.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Upload ComfyUI API Workflow JSON, parse nodes, and build parameter mappings.
workflows.empty: No workflows yet. Click Upload Workflow to import ComfyUI API JSON.
workflows.name: Workflow Name
workflows.tagsPlaceholder: Select existing tags, or type and press Enter to create
workflows.uploadDrop: Drag JSON here, or click to choose a file
workflows.jsonPlaceholder: Paste ComfyUI exported API Workflow JSON
workflows.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Related presets will not be deleted automatically.
workflows.defaultPurpose: ComfyUI API workflow for batch submission and execution

presetsPage.title: Presets
presetsPage.subtitle: Add parameters by node, choosing which are filled at runtime and which are written as fixed workflow values.
presetsPage.empty: No presets yet. Click New Preset to generate one from a workflow.
presetsPage.name: Preset Name
presetsPage.descriptionPlaceholder: Purpose, suitable model, or parameter notes
presetsPage.addHint: Select a node and parameter above, then add it.
presetsPage.outputHint: Only save files produced by selected output nodes
presetsPage.noOutputNodes: No common output nodes found. All outputs will be kept at runtime.
presetsPage.paramExists: This parameter has already been added
presetsPage.invalidFixedValue: {name} fixed value is not a valid {type}
presetsPage.fillNameWorkflow: Enter a name and select a workflow
presetsPage.addOneParam: Add at least one node parameter
presetsPage.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Existing run history will not be deleted.

gallery.title: Runs & Results
gallery.subtitle: The run queue is the result entry. Open finished batches here to review outputs.
gallery.selectSubtitle: Batch management mode: click rows to select whole runs, then delete them together.
gallery.queueHint: Click a row to view results; Detail opens execution details.
gallery.emptyQueue: No run queue yet. Created runs will appear here.
gallery.noCopyableTask: This batch has no copyable tasks
gallery.copiedParamsBack: Copied {count} parameters, returning to Run page
gallery.deleteBatchConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Related task records and result files will also be deleted.
gallery.noDeletableSelection: Selected batches are still running or queued and cannot be deleted directly
gallery.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete {count} finished batches? Related task records and result files will also be deleted.
gallery.resultSubtitle: Images, videos, audio, and files generated by this batch.
gallery.detailSubtitle: Execution progress, task parameters, and run summary for this batch.
gallery.copiedTaskBack: Copied task parameters, returning to Run page
